title: June 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 17''' is the 168th day of the year (169th in leap years), with 197 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1974]] – [[Matthew Senreich]] is born.
*[[1980]] – ''[[The Frozen World of Ota]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1983]] – [[Kamil Lemieszewski]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 107|''Star Wars'' (1977) 107]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 5]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 2|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 2]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[George Lucas]] inducted into the [http://www.sfhomeworld.org/ Science Fiction Museum Hall of Fame].
*[[2007]] – ''[[Robot Chicken: Star Wars]]'' airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 102|''Star Wars Insider'' 102]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 42|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 42]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2016]] – ''Star Wars: A Galactic Spectacular'' debuts at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures]]'' premieres its [[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures Season Two|second season]] with "[[A New Home]]" and "[[Trouble on Tibalt]]" on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge]]'' premieres its [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 3|third]] episode on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*[[2025]] – ''[[The High Republic: Trials of the Jedi]]'' published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic: Trials of the Jedi (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Trials of the Jedi'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The Acolyte: The Visual Guide]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders 3|''The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders'' 3]] to be published.
<noinclude>
